Off Calendar May-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James A. McElroy, esq. (415-282-3072) for PETITIONER.
No other appearances.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER WARREN IRVING's Motion To Compel Response To Out Of State Subpoena; And Monetary Sanctions is off calendar. Petitioner can re-file with proper proof of service.
